# zabbix_host (Data Source)

Fetches a Zabbix host by ID or technical name. Exactly one of `id` or `host` must be provided.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Look up a host by its ID
data "zabbix_host" "by_id" {
  id = "42"
}

# Look up a host by its technical name
data "zabbix_host" "by_name" {
  host = "web-srv-01"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `host` (String) Technical name of the host. One of `id` or `host` must be set.
- `id` (String) Unique identifier of the host. One of `id` or `host` must be set.

### Read-Only

- `description` (String) Description of the host.
- `host_group_ids` (Set of String) Set of host group IDs the host belongs to.
- `inventory_mode` (String) Inventory population mode. One of: `disabled`, `manual`, `automatic`.
- `name` (String) Visible display name of the host.
- `proxy_id` (String) ID of the proxy monitoring the host, or `0` for no proxy.
- `status` (String) Monitoring status of the host. One of: `enabled`, `disabled`.
- `tags` (Attributes Set) Tags attached to the host. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--tags))

<a id="nestedatt--tags"></a>
### Nested Schema for `tags`

Read-Only:

- `name` (String) Tag name.
- `value` (String) Tag value.
